tools.name: Creen AI
tools.description: Unified creative studio with 40+ frontier models for AI video, image, and audio generation. Free and unlimited on select models, no sign up required.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: not specified. 1080p output. No watermark on select tiers.
free_tier_limits.notes: 46 total models: 28 video, 11 image, 7 audio. Premium models (Sora 2 Pro, Veo 3.1) require credits. Pro $29/mo.

tools.notes: Company: CODESAIL LIMITED (HK). iOS and Android apps. Paid: Pro $29/mo, Max, Ultra. Credit packs $10-600/mo.

tools.name: Free.ai
tools.description: Free AI video generator creating short 2-6 second clips from text or images. Part of Free.ai's 400+ tool platform.
tools.referrals: yes - 30,000 bonus tokens per referral (both sides).

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 4s video costs ~10,000 tokens. Also: 2 music tracks/day, 5 images/day on free.
free_tier_limits.notes: Self-hosted models on token pool. Premium (Kling, Runway, Veo, Sora) need paid tokens. Token packs from $5/200K.

tools.notes: Part of Free.ai platform with 400+ tools. 13+ video sub-tools: Movie Generator, Shorts, Avatar, VFX, etc. API available.

tools.name: Google AI Studio
tools.description: Google's browser-based IDE for prototyping with Gemini models. Video generation via Veo is strictly paid — no free tier.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: No free tier for video generation. AI Studio UI free for text/image only.
free_tier_limits.notes: Veo 3.1 pricing: Standard $0.40/s, Fast $0.10/s, Lite $0.05/s. 720p to 4K per-second billing.

tools.notes: 6 Veo models (all paid): 3.1 Standard/Fast/Lite, 3 Standard/Fast, 2. Free trial discontinued. $300 GCP trial excludes Gemini API.

tools.name: Upsampler
tools.description: All-in-one AI platform for video generation (text-to-video, image-to-video) and video upscaling, with free no-sign-up tier.
tools.referrals: yes - affiliate program via FirstPromoter: 30% commission on subscriptions, 10% on credit purchases.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Free upscaler: max 10s, 720p, 50MB per upload. No sign-up required. No watermark.
free_tier_limits.notes: 18 total video models behind platform, 3 on free no-sign-up tier. Paid: Starter (pay-per-credit), Pro $15/mo, Premium $30/mo.

tools.notes: Also offers image gen (42 models), image upscale (6), image restore (17), image edit (24). Credits system for paid tiers.

tools.name: Vidou.ai
tools.description: Free browser-based AI tool that transforms static images into short dynamic videos. No login, no watermark, unlimited generations.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: none advertised. 720p output. No watermark. No login required.
free_tier_limits.notes: Truly free image-to-video and text-to-video. Paid credits ($15.99-69.99) unlock faster speed and 7-day file storage.

tools.notes: NOT the same as Vidu AI (vidu.com). Separate tool registered Nov 2025. 5s 720p clips. Privacy-first, browser-based processing.

tools.name: Kling
tools.description: AI video platform by Kuaishou offering text-to-video, image-to-video, and multimodal tools with native audio and lip-sync.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Standard queue. 30-40% failure rate peak hours. Watermarked. 720p max on free.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free credits reduced from 166 to 66/day. Image-to-video and camera controls available on free. Free outputs watermarked.

tools.notes: Kling 3.0 (Feb 2026) supports up to 4K, 15s, multi-shot (6 cuts), native audio in 5 languages. Revenue run rate exceeded $100M in Mar 2025.

tools.name: Meta AI Vibes
tools.description: Meta's free AI video generation tool to create, remix, and share short-form AI videos by animating images, text prompts, lip sync, and restyling.

free_tier_limits.notes: Completely free as of June 2026. No paid tier announced. Requires Meta/Facebook/Instagram account.

tools.notes: Launched Sep 2025. Available as standalone Vibes app on Google Play (1M+ downloads). Desktop web version in development. Cross-post to Instagram/Facebook Stories.

tools.name: Rewind
tools.description: Free AI video generator with 13 video models (Wan 2.6, Seedance, Veo 3.1, Kling, Sora 2 Pro, Hailuo). No sign-up, no watermark, commercial use OK.
tools.referrals: yes - both users get bonus credits on referral.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Tokens reset every 24h. Each gen costs ~100-5000 tokens. No watermark. Commercial use permitted.
free_tier_limits.notes: Self-hosted models (Wan 2.6) use fewer tokens. Premium models (Seedance, Veo 3.1) cost more but still free with daily tokens.

tools.notes: Part of Rewind.ai platform (400+ tools, 437 models). All 13 models accessible via free daily tokens. MP4 up to 1080p. Token packs from $5.

tools.name: Google Flow
tools.description: Google's AI creative studio for images and videos using Nano Banana Pro and Veo 3.1. Free with 50 daily credits for video.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Credits expire daily. No watermarks. Image gen unlimited and free.
free_tier_limits.notes: Image generation is UNLIMITED and free with Nano Banana Pro. 50 daily credits only for video. One-time 100 welcome credits.

tools.notes: Replaced Whisk AI and ImageFX April 2026. 140+ countries. Paid: AI Plus $4.99/mo (200 credits), AI Pro $19.99/mo (1K credits).
